hero.titleBefore: Technology that turns your shopfront into a
hero.description: Arhyn Technologies helps restaurants, clinics, gyms, and independent businesses trade manual, offline operations for websites, software, and AI automation built around how they actually run.

about.title: We're not web developers. We're business problem-solvers who happen to write code.
about.bodyOne: Arhyn Technologies exists for a specific kind of business: the gym that still tracks memberships on paper, the clinic booking appointments over the phone, the restaurant with no online presence at all. Businesses that are good at what they do, but invisible - or inefficient - online.
about.bodyTwo: We build the website, the software, and the automation that closes that gap - then stay on to support it. Every engagement starts with the operational reality of the business, not a template.
about.missionText: Help offline businesses become digital-first, without losing what makes them work.
about.visionText: A future where no small business is held back by outdated systems or manual, repetitive work.

servicesSection.title: Fifteen ways to close the gap between an offline business and a digital one.

whyChoose.title: Built for businesses that need it to actually work.

industriesSection.title: Different shopfronts. The same broken back office.

journeySection.title: From offline to online, in eight deliberate steps.

projectsSection.title: Real systems, shipped for real businesses.

teamSection.title: Three engineers. One studio. No middlemen.
